name: zoho_invoice
title: Create a GST Invoice on Zoho
description: Create a professional invoice with multiple line items, GST calculation, client details, and download as PDF.
prompt: Go to Zoho Invoice, create a new invoice for 'Acme Corp' with 3 line items including GST, preview and download as PDF
narration_script_text:
Alright hustlers and founders, stop crying over broken spreadsheets! Today, we are generating a pristine, professional GST invoice using Zoho Invoice.

The best part? It's free and needs zero logins. No passwords to forget today. Fire up the free generator page and let's get this bread.

Boom, we're in. First up, who's getting paid? We are. Type in your company name, TechStar Solutions, your name, and address.

And now we take a deep breath. The internet is doing its magic. Hydrate. Stare intensely at the screen... and we're good!

Time to bill the big fish. Enter the client details: Acme Corp International. Drop in their address and lock in the billing state, because the taxman is always watching.

Set that invoice number to INV-2026-001. The first invoice is always the sweetest.

Now for the fun part. Line item one: Web Development Services. Forty units at twenty-five hundred a pop. Don't forget the 9 percent GST.

Line item two: UI/UX Design, twenty units at three thousand.

Now we let Zoho do the heavy lifting. We are not here for mental math.

One more for the road! Line item three: Annual Server Hosting. Eighteen thousand flat.

Quick pause while the totals update. Like a slot machine spin, except you actually win every time.

Almost home. Drop your payment terms in the notes: payment due within 30 days. Add your bank details so the money actually finds its way to you.

Final sanity check. Subtotal, GST, grand total looking absolutely crispy.

Hit that Download button, grab your PDF, and boom!

Flawless GST invoice in under two minutes. Now go get your money!
